description: This file defines the PlayActivity class for an Android app, managing user input, displaying results, and handling interactions related to the Flames relationship calculator feature.

classes.name: PlayActivity
classes.description: An Android Activity managing the main user interface for the Flames relationship calculator feature. It handles user input, displays results, manages history, and interacts with external components like FlamesCalculator and history storage.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, binds UI components, sets up event listeners, and prepares the history repository.

methods.name: onCalculate
methods.description: Handles the calculation of the relationship based on user input, updates the UI, and logs the result into history. Catches and shows errors for invalid input.

methods.name: onClear
methods.description: Resets input fields and result displays, refocusing the first input field.
